temple-ngo-religious-operations.desc_en: Online merit offerings, ceremony scheduling, memorial dedications, donor CRM, subscriptions, and temple accounting.
temple-ngo-religious-operations.desc_zh: 在线功德供奉、法会排期、追思牌位、捐赠人 CRM、订阅续费与寺庙财务一体化管理。

industrial-equipment-wholesale.desc_en: Portal order sync, part-number catalog, SO-to-PO procurement, delivery modes, and package GST invoicing.
industrial-equipment-wholesale.desc_zh: 门户订单同步、料号目录、SO 转 PO 采购、交付模式与分组 GST 开票。

social-recreational-club.desc_en: Membership enrolment, facility booking, events and banquets, restaurant POS, MSL billing, and member portal.
social-recreational-club.desc_zh: 会员入会、设施预约、活动与宴会、餐厅 POS、MSL 账单与会员门户。

precision-cnc-manufacturing.desc_en: High-mix job shop — operation routing, material tracking, multi-level MRP, shop-floor QC, CoC, and billing with Odoo.
precision-cnc-manufacturing.desc_zh: 多品种小批量机加工 — 工艺路线、物料跟踪、多级 MRP、车间质检、CoC 与 Odoo 一体化开票。

positive.desc_en: Project operations, quotation detail, purchasing continuity, approvals, and billing visibility.
positive.desc_zh: 项目运营、报价明细、采购延续、审批流程与开票可视化。

cleantric.desc_en: Online booking, cleaner selection, scheduling, address capture, order follow-through, and payment flow.
cleantric.desc_zh: 在线预约、保洁员选择、排班调度、地址采集、订单跟进与支付流程。

public-safety.desc_en: Firefighting equipment manufacturing, BOM planning, production, QC, serial traceability, and service.
public-safety.desc_zh: 消防设备制造、BOM 计划、生产、质检、序列号追溯与现场服务。

secondary-process-manufacturing.desc_en: Customer-supplied material control, traveler-based routing, IQC/OQC, split and rework handling, and return documentation.
secondary-process-manufacturing.desc_zh: 客供料管控、流转单工艺路线、IQC/OQC、拆批返工处理与退货文档。

food-manufacturing-operations.desc_en: Fresh food and sushi production, kitchen-to-outlet planning, traceability, replenishment, and reporting.
food-manufacturing-operations.desc_zh: 鲜食与寿司生产、中央厨房到门店计划、追溯、补货与报表。

attendance-timesheet-hardware.desc_en: Biometric device connectivity, punch logs, shift control, Excel payroll exports, and timesheet review.
attendance-timesheet-hardware.desc_zh: 生物识别设备对接、打卡日志、班次管控、Excel 薪资导出与工时表审核。

translation-service-operations.desc_en: Language project quoting, job control, delivery tracking, reviewer coordination, invoicing, and customer follow-through.
translation-service-operations.desc_zh: 语言项目报价、作业管控、交付跟踪、审校协调、开票与客户跟进。

gym-equipment-sales-service.desc_en: B2B and B2C equipment sales, delivery coordination, maintenance service, warranty tracking, and customer support.
gym-equipment-sales-service.desc_zh: B2B 与 B2C 设备销售、交付协调、维保服务、保修跟踪与客户支持。

specialty-chemical-trading.desc_en: Chemical sales, procurement, stock visibility, compliance documents, delivery follow-up, and customer account control.
specialty-chemical-trading.desc_zh: 化学品销售、采购、库存可视化、合规文档、交付跟进与客户账期管控。

school-uniform-seller.desc_en: Uniform sales, product sizing, school-linked ordering, inventory control, and customer fulfilment.
school-uniform-seller.desc_zh: 校服销售、尺码管理、学校关联订购、库存管控与客户履约。

corporate-hamper-gifting.desc_en: Multi-recipient hamper ordering, eCommerce and counter sales, delivery control, gifting messages, and follow-up.
corporate-hamper-gifting.desc_zh: 多收件人礼盒订购、eCommerce 与柜台销售、配送管控、贺卡留言与跟进。

pet-food-accessories-ecommerce.desc_en: Premium online retail, product bundles, loyalty, fulfilment, delivery tracking, and customer account follow-up.
pet-food-accessories-ecommerce.desc_zh: 高端在线零售、产品套装、会员积分、履约配送、物流跟踪与客户跟进。

scaffolding.title_zh: 脚手架租赁与项目索赔
scaffolding.desc_en: Rental orders, site deliveries, returns, claims, warehouse movement, billing, and project visibility.
scaffolding.desc_zh: 租赁订单、现场交付、归还、索赔、仓库调拨、开票与项目可视化。

bakery-ecommerce-operations.desc_en: Online cake ordering, delivery or collection slots, kitchen capacity control, memberships, and loyalty.
bakery-ecommerce-operations.desc_zh: 在线蛋糕订购、配送或自提时段、厨房产能管控、会员与积分忠诚计划。

lab-testing-process.desc_en: Lab testing workflow, sample tracking, quality checks, result reporting, and operational follow-through.
lab-testing-process.desc_zh: 检测工作流、样品跟踪、质量检查、结果报告与运营跟进。
